rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GERTIE VICTORIA FOSTER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distrubition Of The Reserve
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. No receipts have been filed for the final distributions ordered on 5/31/24 and no informational accounting has been filed, showing how the $1,888,770.30 purported to be on hand in March 2024 has been disbursed/distributed. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JAMES FAMILY TRUST DATED SEPTEMBER 13, 1973
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/12/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (3) Please file a copy of the Letters issued to Phoebe Presber James, certified within 60 days, showing that she is the executor of her father's will. (4) There are minor beneficiaries of the GST trusts whose interests could be affected. How old are they? Who represents their interests? See CRC 7.51(d) re notice to minors. (5) Not all beneficiaries of the GST trusts (mentioned in footnote 2 on page 5 of the petition) appear to have been given notice. Objections just filed on 12/16/24 have not yet been fully reviewed, as no courtesy copy has been received as of 12/18/24. Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 2/26/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LYNDA DARNEL SIMS-RYANS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 01/29/2025 (no earlier date available) for the following issues to be addressed: 1) Probate Advance (whose request for special notice is on file) has not filed a waiver of notice of the amended petition (which was filed on 12/13/2024, less than 15 days before this hearing), nor has it filed a waiver of notice of proposed action and/or consent to proposed action (donation of tangible personal items, settlement of real property claim, and sale of real property). 2) Re the supplemental declaration filed on 12/18/2024: i) No verification signed by the petitioner was attached. At a minimum, the facts alleged in paragraph 2 must be verified by the petitioner. ii) Paragraph 3 is nonresponsive and did not explain why the decedent's Citibank accounts ($27,563.41) listed in the petitioner's final accounting filed in the decedent's conservatorship case (PCN-18-301852) as assets on hand as of the date of death were not inventoried and appraised as assets of this estate (did both accounts have designated pay-on-death beneficiaries?). iii) Paragraph 4 did not explain why the $53,75 cost, if related to the decedent's conservatorship case, was not requested before the order terminating the conservatorship and approving the attorneys' costs incurred through 03/31/2023 was issued.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF LARRY MAH
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/10/2025. The petition appears premature for the examiner's review. The only document on file is the petition. The beginning assets should mirror the assets reported on I&A, not including the real property in another state. Notice, proposed order, additional bond, proof of payment of assessment fees, bank statements and other required documents for accounting petition have not been filed.
